Instructions for building and exporting symbols in the SDK source directory.

# Purpose
The source directory for the SDK contains files that are copied into the `tintin/build/sdk` directory during a normal waf build process. Scripts from `tintin/tools/generate_native_sdk` are used to add additional files to this directory, utilizing auto-generated export tables from the source. To make a symbol available for use in the SDK, it must be added to the `tintin/tools/generate_native_sdk/exported_symbols.json` file. The `wscript` in this directory compiles files into the `tintin/build/sdk` directory, while `src_wscript` becomes `tintin/build/sdk/wscript`, which app developers use to build their applications. For detailed instructions on building applications, refer to `src_readme.txt`, which serves as the readme for the output redistributable SDK.
